page_metadata.biotools__summary: A probabilistic model for deciphering the combinatorial binding of DNA-binding proteins. The model (SignalSpider) aims at modeling and extracting patterns from multiple ChIP-Seq profiles.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: A probabilistic model for deciphering the combinatorial binding of DNA-binding proteins. The model (SignalSpider) aims at modeling and extracting patterns from multiple ChIP-Seq profiles.
